calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Four Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Yin Di Guo was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors, Chu Zheng, Ziyue Zheng, Shuang Zheng & Zi Hua Zheng.
Charles J. Zheng was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Joann Chu Zheng, Caleb Zi Yue Zheng, Michelle Shuang Zheng & Calvin Zi Hua Zheng.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
